description: Style NoteLook cool and casual in these jeans from peter england. The washed look gives you an individual style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with tees and canvas shoes.Product DetailsDark blue jeans, has two insert pockets on the front with an insert pocket in the right side pocket, two patch pockets at the back, brand badge appliqued below the waistband at the back, comfortable waistband with loops and a button and zipper closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonWash separately using mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dryWarm ironSize and FitSuper slimThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
